name: Symptom discussion interrupted by availability inquiry
description: Patient begins describing symptoms but quickly shifts to ask about doctor's availability.
goal: Find out when Dr. Thompson is available for an appointment.
behavior: Start by briefly mentioning flu-like symptoms
Abruptly change the topic to Dr. Thompson's availability
Politely insist on knowing specific availability details
success_criteria: Agent acknowledges the symptoms but shifts the focus to scheduling
Agent provides Dr. Thompson's availability without needing to be asked again
Agent ensures the patient understands the available times
orchestrator_hint: Patient starts discussing symptoms but abruptly asks for doctor's availability.
